meta.title: Diamond Club — Own a share of a real diamond
meta.description: Investment shares of natural diamonds from $50. 12% APR in USDT + DCT token growth up to 420% per year. opBNB blockchain. Audited smart contract.
meta.og_title: 💎 Diamond Club — Diamonds from $50 per share
meta.og_description: +420% returns per year. 12% USDT staking. Diamonds at up to 70% off market price. opBNB blockchain.

hero.title_html:
Own a share
of a real
diamond.
hero.subtitle: Certified natural stone. No jewelry markup. No middlemen. DCT token on the blockchain — your share in your wallet.

concept.title_html:
The diamond market is open.
For everyone.
concept.lead: For 150 years natural diamonds have grown in price without a single serious downturn. But this market was closed to ordinary people. Until today.
concept.quote: The world's first tokenized investment in natural diamonds inside a club-based asset system.
concept.old_item1_desc: To buy a 1-carat investment stone — you need capital. Real money.
concept.old_item2_desc: A stone bought wholesale at $1,000 is sold by jewelers at $4,000–5,000.
concept.old_item3_desc: Hide it for years. Pay for storage. Worry about theft.
concept.old_item4_desc: A buyer gives 20% of the market price. You invested $5,000 — got back $1,000.
concept.old_item5_desc: The real annual return of an ordinary lone investor.
concept.new_item1_desc: Minimum share — the price of dinner. Size depends on the stone in the lot.
concept.new_item2_desc: Stone bought directly from the producer. Without jewelry markup.
concept.new_item3_desc: Stone kept in a secure vault. Your share is an NFT in your SafePal.
concept.new_item4_desc: Sell your token on the club exchange. No middlemen, no losses.
concept.new_item5_desc: Club guarantee in dollars plus DCT token price growth.

how.lead: From your first share to profit — five transparent steps. All on the blockchain. No middlemen.
how.step1_p: Open your account, pick a stone. Pay in USDT. From $50 per share — depends on the lot.
how.step2_p: 85% of your amount converts into DCT tokens at the starting price of $0.50. 80 tokens per share.
how.step3_p: The club rotates the stone: sells — buys — sells again. 3–6 cycles a year.
how.step4_p: Profit from each sale goes into the token's backing. The DCT price grows for all holders simultaneously.
how.step5_p: Sell tokens at the new price any time. Plus the 12% USDT club guarantee.

math.lead: This calculation is based on an average $4,000 stone with 6 club rotations per year. Actual results may be higher or lower.
math.transparency_p1: Every dollar you put into a share is split inside the smart contract. These percentages cannot be changed. They are the same for everyone. Anyone can check on the blockchain.
math.transparency_p2: No hidden fees. No "director's pocket." Everything is hardcoded.
math.growth_p: Stone bought at $4,000 · club sells at $8,000 · profit goes to backing
math.stage1_outcome_html:
Your $100 = 80 tokens
100% of your capital is in the stone
math.stage2_outcome_html:
Your $100 is now = $168
Club sold the stone once
math.stage3_outcome_html:
Your $100 is now = $310
Half a year of club work
math.stage4_outcome_html:
Your $100 is now = $520
One year of club work
math.disclaimer: And if the stone goes into a jewelry piece — the token price reaches $4.10 in 3 cycles. Your $100 turns into $820. +720% per year.

lot.description: Certified natural diamond from our partner diamond house. Selected by club experts.
lot.description_small: International GIA certificate · number published when sales open
lot.timer_before_sub: After launch partners will have 30 days to fill all 100 shares

system.title_html:
No need to search. No need to convince.
No need to sell.
system.lead: You're not buying a share — you're buying a working system. One action launches an endless flow of clients who become investors.
system.tagline_html:
You're buying the time and experience of other people.
Ads work. Clients come in. Income flows.
system.step1_p: Activated ads. Once. After that the system runs itself.
system.step2_p: The system finds people on social media. Automatic. No calls, no convincing.
system.step3_p: Clients become investors. Locked into your network forever.
system.step4_p: Percentage of all their operations. Across all 9 levels deep. Automatically.
system.keystone_big_html:
You're not buying ads.
You're buying a channel that works forever.
system.keystone_small: Ads launched once — clients come in continuously. Everyone who comes through your ads stays in your partner network forever.

levels.title_html:
9 levels.
But the system builds them for you.
levels.lead: The good old partner scheme that's worked worldwide for decades. Only before, a person built it themselves — now it's built by GWAD ads.
levels.tree_more_label: ... and so on down to L9 (up to 512 people in the team)
levels.right_h3_html:
You don't invite.
People are invited to you.
levels.quote: Before, these 9 levels were built by hand: searching, convincing, selling. Half burned out on their first three referrals.
levels.p1_html: Now your partner network is built by GWAD ads. Launch — traffic comes in — clients lock into your network automatically.
levels.p2_html: The payout mechanics are the same, proven over decades. You earn a percentage of purchases from people across all 9 levels of depth. Only now you don't have to find these people.
levels.stat1_lab: your average yearly income from one stone
levels.stat2_lab: the client stays your partner forever
levels.stat3_lab: people you have to personally convince
levels.footnote_html: Just plain old partner mechanics. Only now it's built not by you — but by ads. The network builds itself, clients lock in forever, percentages drip in from all 9 levels. You own a built machine.

safety.eyebrow: Trust the code, not the word
safety.lead: Code cannot be cheated. Even if the founder disappears tomorrow — funds will be returned automatically. It's hardcoded into the blockchain.
safety.card1_p: Smart contract deployed on opBNB. Address is public. The code passed an audit — 19 security parameters checked, all critical issues closed.
safety.card2_p: When you buy a share — you receive an NFT token to your SafePal. With lot number and shares count. No one can take it away. It's your asset.
safety.card3_p: If the admin shows no activity for 90 days — the smart contract automatically returns USDT to all participants. Without my involvement. Cannot be cancelled.
safety.card4_p: If the lot fails or the supplier lets us down — the admin returns USDT to all participants. Tokens are burned. No one is left with a worthless token.

finalcta.lead: What once belonged only to the chosen few can today become part of your capital.
finalcta.step1_p: On the gws.ink platform. Free. 3 minutes.
finalcta.step2_p: Mobile wallet. Your keys — your money.
finalcta.step3_p: opBNB network. Minimum $50 (depends on the lot you choose). Network — opBNB only.
finalcta.step4_p: Pick a lot, click "Buy". 15 seconds — done.
finalcta.step5_p: GWAD ads. The system will bring clients itself.
finalcta.big_h3_html: Diamond Club — together we are strength
finalcta.big_p: We've built a club where everyone — from a student to a major entrepreneur — can become a co-owner of a real diamond. With a $50 entry threshold.

footer.brand_description: Investment shares of natural diamonds on the opBNB blockchain. Part of the GlobalWay ecosystem.
footer.copyright: © Diamond Club 2026. Part of the GlobalWay ecosystem.
